output.final_deliverable:
Chain of Wikipedia URLs (each next URL found on previous page):

1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents/Portals
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Arts
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting
5. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Impressionism

Verified adjacency pair (evidence):
- The page https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting contains a link to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Impressionism
  - Evidence: On the Painting page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting) the text includes a hyperlink to "Impressionism" which points to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Impressionism. (See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting)

Notes on process and evidence:
- I started at the Main Page: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
  - From that page I followed the "Portals" link which led to the Portals contents page: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents/Portals
    - Evidence: the Main Page links to the Portals contents page (see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page)
- From the Portals page I selected the Arts portal: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Arts
  - Evidence: the Portals page lists the Arts portal (see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents/Portals)
- From the Arts portal I followed the link to the Painting article: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting
  - Evidence: the Portal:Arts page links to the Painting article (see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Arts)
- From the Painting article I followed the link to the Impressionism article: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Impressionism
  - Evidence: the Painting article links to Impressionism (see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Painting)

If you want, I can provide the specific HTML snippets or exact anchor text locations showing the links on each page.
output.action_summary: Built a chain of 5 Wikipedia URLs starting at the Main Page, with each next URL present as a link on the previous page. Verified that Painting links to Impressionism and provided the chain and source page URLs: Main Page -> Portal:Contents/Portals -> Portal:Arts -> Painting -> Impressionism.
